_doc: Major-festival booking presence → festival_score (computeFestivalScore.js). tier: 1.0 = global flagship, 0.6 = major regional/boutique. acts[] MUST match rankings.json names EXACTLY (a mismatch just self-heals — the act is treated as unmeasured, never penalised). STARTER SEED, hand-entered from well-known headliner relationships — VERIFY + EXPAND via a scraper (fetchFestivals.js, Songkick festival tags / lineup aggregators) and refresh each season. Coverage is the gate: the signal only nudges acts listed here.
